name: Mongrel
short_description: The only roguelite where your only form of public transport is getting flushed in a toilet. Gain reputation with intellectually struggling humans to get a chance at intimacy with the only female in town and fight your way through the underworld to uncover the secrets of this twisted society!
detailed_description:
A TWISTED SOCIETY

Human intellect has withered. In this bizarre world, every child is born from the same mother, and rulebreakers are flushed straight down the toilet. Journey through the world of Yonder and uncover the unsettling secrets behind its distorted society.

FIND UPGRADES

Open ancient eggs scattered across the wild to uncover rare weapons, unique upgrades, and game-changing perks. Survival depends on building an unstoppable arsenal as you fight your way deeper into the underworld.

EARN REPUTATION WITH FAKE COMPLIMENTS

The people never forget your sins, but they’re easily swayed by flattery. Offer fake compliments to climb the ranks of society. Only at the top can you earn intimacy, but fall too far and you’ll become the target of those you once tried to impress.



A WILD STORY WITH UNEXPECTED TURNS

Prepare yourself for a story full of shocking twists and unexpected turns. As you venture through the world of Yonder. The key to survival? Friendship. Gather a group of allies, each with their own skills and stories, as you face the evil Fergooson together.
